title: The Golden Slug
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|What are we doing here?|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="Jedi Trial">''[[Jedi Trial]]''</ref>}}
'''The Golden Slug''' was a run-down hotel with a sleazy bar in the lobby. It was located in a dead-end street just off a main thoroughfare of the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]]. The place was a mess with debris on the floor, broken furniture, and the sign featured two broken letters due to a drunken melee that had occurred in the establishment.

Prior to the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]], [[Nejaa Halcyon]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] traveled there to visit [[Grudo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]''
